# Data Science Hub

You are building a complete Web-based Data Science Hub using Plain PHP.

Tech Stack: PHP 8.x, MySQL, PDO, Apache (XAMPP), Bootstrap 5, JavaScript ES6, Fetch API, Font Awesome, Chart.js, DataTables, PhpSpreadsheet, Dompdf.

Never use Laravel, CodeIgniter, Symfony, React, Vue, Node.js, or Python.

Use modular architecture, PDO prepared statements, Bootstrap, reusable helpers, password_hash/password_verify, validate input, escape output. Generate only requested files.
